message.content:
@startuml

participant "TaskExecutionStrategy" as TES #GreenYellow
participant "Action" as ACT #GreenYellow
participant "Connection" as CON
participant "SSH client/server connection" as SSH
participant "ssh daemon (or winrm service)" as SSHD

TES -> ACT : init(..)
TES -> ACT : init(..)
TES -> ACT : run()
ACT -> CON : put_file()
CON -> SSH : transfer module data
SSH -> SSHD : 
note right of SSHD : save module to disk
SSHD --> SSH :
SSH --> CON : transfer complete
CON --> ACT : return remote path
ACT -> CON : exec_command()
CON -> SSH : run module remotely
SSH -> SSHD :
note right of SSHD : execute shell command
SSHD --> SSH :
SSH --> CON : return response code, stdout, stderr
CON --> ACT : return response code, stdout, stderr
ACT --> TES : return JSON

@enduml
